cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the beach. Let me start by reading through the information again carefully. Leslie woke up at 5am. Then, Emily saw Leslie in class from 5am to 9am. After that, Anthony saw Leslie watching a movie from 9am to 11am. Then, Thomas saw Leslie buying cookies from 11am to 4pm. Next, Ashley saw Leslie fixing their computer from 4pm to 5pm. Finally, Susan saw Leslie walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. Also, the beach was closed after 10pm. So the question is, between what times could Leslie have gone to the beach? The options are A) 5pm to 9pm, B) 9am to 11am, C) 9pm to 10pm, D) 4pm to 5pm. First, I need to map out Leslie's known activities and see when there are gaps in their schedule. The beach must be visited during a time when the beach is open (before 10pm) and when Leslie isn't doing something else. Let's list out the timeline: - 5am: Wakes up - 5am
